prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild, Celestia Vale in a modest travel dress and Ren Brightford in a workshop apron; Celestia approaches Ren's workbench and carefully spreads a weathered, aged parchment map across the wooden surface. Both characters lean in closely, their faces illuminated by warm tavern lantern light, as Celestia gestures to a specific section of the map to begin an examination. Anime style, clear body action, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ren Brightford picks up a small magnifying lens to inspect the texture of the parchment while Celestia Vale points to a mysterious symbol on the map. They exchange a look of focused, professional concern, confirming the quality and authenticity of the map together. Consistent character identities, camera angle, and warm lighting, no text, no watermark.
